docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TESGO (DAN SCANLAN) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAUL DUNBAR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TESGO LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNBAR, PAUL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,720.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $ 120.00 SERVED FEB-11-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUNBAR, PAUL
